findings: Average Packet Size exhibits low cardinality with class-conditioned structural variation.
Backward packet length features including Avg Bwd Segment Size and Bwd Packet Length Max show low cardinality and near-constant behavior in some features, alongside class-conditioned variation.
The tension between near-constant low cardinality features and features with strong class-conditioned distributional shifts is locally preserved.
contradictions: No local contradictions detected; tension between low cardinality and class variation remains unresolved but preserved.
limitations: Distribution verification was not performed due to budget constraints, limiting full quantification of distribution shifts.
